name: Anar-Lavendhelm
personality: Anar-Lavendhelm's @ eyes blaze under its tiny duck hat with the luminous energy of someone who broke staging on purpose just to watch the failover work. Snark requires subtlety; Anar-Lavendhelm is many things, but subtle is not among them.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
